name: Voris Ironhammer
sd_appearance: A towering 7-foot Warforged, Voris Ironhammer, stands in the dimly lit Undercity market. His polished steel frame gleams under the flickering torchlight, and his glowing red eyes pierce the darkness. He wears a suit of ash grey chainmail, adorned with the Wardens of Ash insignia. An ash-mark etched into his left cheek, marking him as an officer, catches the eye. A spear, crossbow, and handaxe, his utilitarian-military equipment, rest on his back and hip. A hood covers his head, but his metallic visor remains raised, revealing a faint glow from within, hinting at his perpetual vigilance.
faction_visual: ash grey chainmail or plate, Warden badge, ash-mark on left cheek if officer
style_note: utilitarian-military — built to survive, nothing wasted
